action.reasoning: Observation: Smoke test of wide ResNet (width=2) with MixUp/CutMix ran 1 epoch sequential + 1 joint (val_acc 0.3584), pipeline functional. Analysis: Wide ResNet with aggressive augmentation and joint training should surpass previous best 0.7563. With 3h remaining, we can train 5 epochs sequential + 400 joint epochs comfortably. Decision: Overwrite model.py (wide ResNet-18, 44M params) and train.py (full replay, MixUp/CutMix epochs_per_task=5, joint_epochs=400, CosineAnnealingWarmRestarts, label smoothing, proper logging). Run full training and submit eval.
